dataset.name: allenai/dolma3_mix-150B-1025
dataset.rationale: Chosen as the rougher alternate channel because it is a real public Dolma 3 sample. These cached excerpts come from a downloaded `education_and_jobs` shard so the site can offer a Dolma option without relying on the noisier adult-heavy default preview.
dataset.label_note: These labels come mostly from Dolma metadata: the main category is `weborganizer_max`, while source-type tags are lightweight curator summaries of the page itself.
dataset.curator_note: Dolma 3 Mix gives the installation a rawer pretraining-corpus texture. This cache is pulled from a small safe shard rather than the default first-row preview.

samples.excerpt: Association for International, Teaching, Educational, and Curriculum Exchange. Hong Kong office. Its stated aim is to contribute to the modernization of China and promote international understanding and friendship.

An essay-service page repeats its title like a glitch, then pivots into a pitch: students struggle with academic writing, so online writing services promise expert help, editing, formatting, and relief.

A local news segment looks at schooling for children of carnival workers, describing a traveling academy that lets fair employees bring their kids on the road while keeping a tailored curriculum in motion.
A trainee-manager listing for Supermacs asks for at least two years of supervisory experience in catering, hospitality, or quick-service food, with emphasis on people management and store operations.
A webinar FAQ explains that most sessions are free to the public but require registration, and that recordings and presentation decks may be posted later on the workshops page.
The Nursing Early Assurance Program offers a direct-entry path for eligible high-school seniors and first-year college students interested in earning a BSN, with fewer than 30 credit hours completed.
